ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "government_form" TEXT /* Form of government */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_security_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for this data */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "calories_produced" REAL /* Total calories produced in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "caloric_requirement" REAL /* Caloric requirement of the population */,
  "cropland_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land used for cropland */,
  "sufficiency_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of sufficiency in calorie production */,
  "percentage_of_total_calories" REAL /* Percentage of total calories produced compared to global production */,
  "yield" REAL /* Crop yield per unit of cropland */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop */,
  "agricultural_practice" TEXT /* Agricultural practice used */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region where the data is collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data (0-1 scale) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_security_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_stats" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for this population data */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the population data is recorded */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count of the country */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in rural areas */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy at birth */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_stats_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_data" (
  "agricultural_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for this agricultural data */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the agricultural data is recorded */,
  "cropland_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land used for cropland */,
  "yield" REAL /* Crop yield per unit of cropland */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop */,
  "irrigation_type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation used */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil */,
  "fertilizer_use" REAL /* Amount of fertilizer used per unit of land */,
  "pesticide_use" REAL /* Amount of pesticide used per unit of land */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the agricultural data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agricultural_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caloric_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caloric production data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for this caloric production data */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the caloric production data is recorded */,
  "calories_produced" REAL /* Total calories produced in the country */,
  "percentage_of_total_calories" REAL /* Percentage of total calories produced compared to global production */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop */,
  "caloric_density" REAL /* Caloric density of the crop */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the caloric production data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caloric_production_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data accessed in kilobytes */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the data access request in milliseconds */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES food_security_data ("data_id")
)
